body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/import/quota 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/import/quota 
 ## 接口描述 
支持外部系统将预算方案编制额度导入系统。
支持导入编制额进行覆盖和追加两种。
预算导入额度不能超过1000条。
不支持部分成功。
 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetPlanName","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%8B%9B%E5%BE%85%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97","desc":"","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetCycle","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E5%91%A8%E6%9C%9F%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201%20%E6%9C%88%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%0A2%20%E5%AD%A3%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%0A3%20%E5%B9%B4%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetPlanId","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"XXX0001","desc":"","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"operationType","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","maxLength":"10","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%200-%E8%A6%86%E7%9B%96%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E9%A2%9D%0A1-%E8%BF%BD%E5%8A%A0%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E9%A2%9D%0A%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA%E8%A6%86%E7%9B%96%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E9%A2%9D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"budgetPlanEstablishQuotas","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6%E5%AF%B9%E8%B1%A1","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%811000%E6%9D%A1%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6","maxLength":"1000"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"orgId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"BUDGETORG20230317154944","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6%E4%B8%BA1%E3%80%813%E6%97%B6%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB%E3%80%82%E5%BD%93%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E4%B8%BA%E2%80%9C%E5%85%B6%E4%BB%96%E2%80%9D%E6%97%B6%E5%A1%AB%E2%80%9C%23%E2%80%9D","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"orgName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E6%8B%9B%E5%BE%85","desc":"","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"subjectName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6%E4%B8%BA2%E3%80%813%E6%97%B6%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"quotaOfEachPeriods","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%AF%8F%E6%9C%9F%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%8160%E6%9C%9F","maxLength":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"periodNumber","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%A2%9D%E6%89%80%E5%9C%A8%E6%9C%9F%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%20%E5%80%BC%E5%BA%94%E5%9C%A8%E6%89%80%E5%9C%A8%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%9C%9F%E6%95%B0%E5%86%85","maxLength":"5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"initialQuota","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E5%88%9D%E5%A7%8B%E9%A2%9D","exampleValue":"1000.00","desc":"%20%E6%95%B4%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%879%E4%BD%8D%EF%BC%8C%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%872%E4%BD%8D%0A%0A%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA0-%E8%A6%86%E7%9B%96%EF%BC%8C%E6%88%96%E8%80%85%E6%B2%A1%E6%9C%89%E4%BC%A0%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E5%88%9D%E5%A7%8B%E9%A2%9D%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA","maxLength":"9,2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"addQuota","required":false,"maxLength":"9,2","label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E8%BF%BD%E5%8A%A0%E9%A2%9D","exampleValue":"1000.00","desc":"%20%E6%95%B4%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%879%E4%BD%8D%EF%BC%8C%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E4%BD%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%872%E4%BD%8D%0A%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA1-%E8%BF%BD%E5%8A%A0%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E8%BF%BD%E5%8A%A0%E9%A2%9D%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"}}]}]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","exampleValue":"true","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","label":"%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 编制额覆盖请求报文
```json
{
  "budgetPlanName": "222",
  "budgetCycle": "1",
  "budgetPlanId": "2222",
  "operationType":"0"
  "budgetPlanEstablishQuotas": [
    {
      "orgId": "BUDGETORG20230317154944",
      "orgName": "测试招待",
      "quotaOfEachPeriods": [
          {
            "periodNumber": 0,
            "initialQuota": 10000000.00
          }
       ]
    }
  ]
}
```
### 编制额追加请求报文
```json
{
  "budgetPlanName": "222",
  "budgetCycle": "1",
  "budgetPlanId": "2222",
  "operationType":"1"
  "budgetPlanEstablishQuotas": [
    {
      "orgId": "BUDGETORG20230317154944",
      "orgName": "测试招待",
      "quotaOfEachPeriods": [
          {
            "periodNumber": 0,
            "addQuota": 10000000.00
          }
       ]
    }
  ]
}
```
### 响应报文
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "调用成功！"
}
  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | Data | Data |
